title: PART 01, GENERAL. CHAPTER 04. PROCEDURES FOR REGIONALIZED PROCESSING
description: This chapter provides [education] procedures that apply to all ROs (Regional Offices). These procedures affect the Adjudication, Veterans Services, Administrative, and VR&C (Vocational Rehabilitation and Counseling) divisions and Finance activities.
keywords: m22-4, claims, processing, benefits, gi bill, training, veteran, sco, elr
